name: Cape Cod Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 Can Campbells New England clam chowder soup
recipeInstructions:
1 Gradually blend the soup, garlic, and Worcestershire sauce into the cream cheese using an electric mixer until just smooth. Overbeating will make the dip thinner.
2 Chill the mixture.
3 Serve with crackers or chips. Makes 2 cups.
